implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: AC-002: resume publish on matched approval
AC-004: paused build survives daemon restart
AC-006: publish failures log WARNING, do not regress SQLite

completion_promises.criterion_text: When the autobuild_runner's _update_state writes lifecycle="awaiting_approval", a pipeline.build-paused.<feature_id> envelope is published with the build's correlation_id.
completion_promises.evidence: Carried forward from turn 1 (Coach status: verified). LifecycleEmitterAdapter in src/forge/subagents/autobuild_runner.py routes 'awaiting_approval' lifecycle through emit_paused, threading BuildContext.correlation_id onto the envelope. Verified by TestPausePublishAwaitingApproval::test_update_state_awaiting_approval_publishes_build_paused (subject == 'pipeline.build-paused.FEAT-X', envelope.correlation_id == 'corr-001').

completion_promises.criterion_text: When the approval subscriber matches an approval response with the build's correlation_id, a pipeline.build-resumed.<feature_id> envelope is published before the orchestrator advances.
completion_promises.evidence: Carried forward from turn 1 (Coach status: verified). ApprovalSubscriber.await_response accepts lifecycle_emitter+build_context+expected_correlation_id; _on_envelope publishes emit_resumed BEFORE queue.put. Verified by TestResumePublishOnApproval::test_first_arrival_publishes_build_resumed and test_resume_published_before_orchestrator_advances (publish-before-dequeue ordering asserted).

completion_promises.criterion_text: An approval response with a mismatched correlation_id does NOT publish build-resumed; the build stays paused (Group E security scenario; DDR-001 / ASSUM-016).
completion_promises.evidence: Carried forward from turn 1 (Coach status: verified). ApprovalSubscriber._on_envelope Step 2b rejects responses whose envelope.correlation_id != registered expected_correlation_id; logs WARNING and returns early before dedup/enqueue/publish. Verified by TestMismatchedCorrelationIdRejected::test_mismatched_correlation_does_not_publish_resumed.

completion_promises.criterion_text: After a daemon restart while a build is paused, the build re-enters paused state, re-emits build-paused, and re-publishes the approval request with the same correlation_id (Group D scenario; ADR-ARCH-021).
completion_promises.evidence: Carried forward from turn 1 (Coach status: verified). tests/integration/test_pause_resume_e2e.py::TestPauseResumeRoundTrip::test_pause_restart_resume_round_trip simulates daemon restart by re-instantiating LifecycleEmitterAdapter and calling _update_state(awaiting_approval) on the rehydrated state. Asserts second build-paused envelope's correlation_id is verbatim CORRELATION_ID (ADR-ARCH-021 reuse).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Only the first approval response wins (idempotent first-wins from FEAT-FORGE-004; not new behaviour but exercised by the test).
completion_promises.evidence: Carried forward from turn 1 (Coach status: verified). _check_and_record dedup buffer (asyncio.Lock-guarded) drops duplicates before reaching the publish path. Verified by TestFirstResponseWins::test_second_matching_response_is_dedup_dropped (sequential) and test_only_first_approval_advances_orchestrator (concurrent via asyncio.gather) — both assert exactly one build-resumed publish and one queue entry.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Publish failures on emit_build_paused / emit_build_resumed log at WARNING and do not regress SQLite state.
completion_promises.evidence: Carried forward from turn 1 (Coach status: verified). LifecycleEmitterAdapter._safe_run wraps every scheduled coroutine in try/except + WARNING log; ApprovalSubscriber._on_envelope wraps emit_resumed in try/except so the queue still receives even when publish fails. Verified by TestPublishFailureContract (pause + resume failure variants assert WARNING/ERROR log + state continuity).

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Turn 2 fix: ran `ruff check` and `python -m black --check` on all four task-touched files (src/forge/subagents/autobuild_runner.py, src/forge/adapters/nats/approval_subscriber.py, tests/forge/test_pause_resume_publish.py, tests/integration/test_pause_resume_e2e.py). Initial black --check flagged 3 files needing reformatting; applied `python -m black` to bring them up to PEP 8 / 88-char convention. Final state: `ruff check` reports 'All checks passed!' and `black --check` reports '4 files would be left unchanged.' All 261 tests across the affected test surfaces (pause-resume new tests + autobuild_runner + pipeline_lifecycle + approval_round_trip + pause_and_publish_atomicity + unrecognised_responder + concurrent_responses + gating) still pass after formatting — zero regressions from the formatting pass.
